questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Vipul goes Northward 10 m. He turns left and walks 30 m, then the again turns left and walks 50 m, then how much distance Vipul travelled?

solutions.solution: According to the question, we have the following direction diagram. So, Kate is facing towards North.
According to the question, the direction diagram is as follows. The home of boy was in East direction from his school.
According to the question, the direction diagram is as follows. So, Rani is facing towards East and Sarita is facing towards South.
According to the question,the direction diagram is as follows. So, she is running in the North-East direction.
According to the question, the direction diagram is drawn as follows. Total distance = PO + OQ + QR = 10 + 30 + 50 = 90 m
